title: Golden Globes 2026: Final Predictions & Supporting Actress Analysis
text: Best Supporting Actress Prediction: According to Variety's awards predictions, Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas from Sentimental Value is favored to win the Golden Globe for Best Supporting Actress. The analysis notes that Amy Madigan (Weapons) and Emily Blunt (The Smashing Machine) represent credible alternative scenarios for an upset victory. Key Context: The article emphasizes that this year's Golden Globes ceremony promises several historic possibilities. In the supporting actress race specifically, Lilleaas's projected win would represent another strong showing for Sentimental Value, which also has Stellan Skarsgård predicted to triumph in the supporting actor category. The predictions reflect voting that closed on January 3rd, ahead of the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony hosted by Nikki Glaser on January 11th. Other Notable Predictions: The piece highlights that several winners could make history, including Wagner Moura potentially becoming the first Brazilian man nominated in the category for lead actor in a drama.
